summary:
GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND GLOBAL EVENTS: Brandon outlines several international developments, asserting that Russia and Venezuela will form an alliance involving BRICS, oil reserves, and the transfer of Russian hypersonic missiles to Venezuela. He compares the future Venezuelan prime minister to Saddam Hussein. Regarding the Middle East, Brandon discusses Iraq's hydrocarbon law and Article 140, calling for wealth distribution and the reinstatement of the Iraqi dinar to alleviate poverty, while noting that three men are hoarding the nation's wealth. He also details the discovery of large caches of encrypted SIM cards—40,000 in Europe and over 100,000 in American cities like New York, New Jersey, and Seattle—which he identifies as an underground communication network. Additionally, Brandon states that Japan and South Korea will embrace crypto-backed currencies, with South Korea and Taiwan serving as end-time hubs for spreading the gospel across Asia, despite communist attempts to infiltrate the South Korean government.

DOMESTIC MIGRATION AND POLITICAL FORECASTS: Brandon describes a coming wave of migration where residents, particularly Christian families, will flee Northeastern states like New York and Pennsylvania to relocate down South due to riots and political dissatisfaction. He firmly opposes Zohran Mamdani in New York, declaring America a Christian nation and rejecting the implementation of Islamic policies in the United States. Furthermore, Brandon warns of political shifts in the Midwest, specifically noting an attempt to turn Oklahoma blue during the next governor's race. He identifies a dividing line from Altus to Miami, Oklahoma, and urges people to pray for states like Arkansas, Louisiana, and Texas to remain conservative strongholds and places of refuge.

INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND NEW YORK CITY VISIONS: Brandon recounts a vision of a strategic attack on an all-glass building in New York City, which he identifies as either Trump Tower or Central Park Tower, located near the East River. He describes an explosion and fire engulfing the 40th and 41st floors, caused by a man-made device or rocket launcher fired from barges on the river. Brandon clarifies that this attack is merely a distraction from a larger hidden agenda. He highlights the timeframe between Thanksgiving and New Year's Eve, specifically mentioning the Rockefeller Center tree lighting and holiday parades, as critical periods requiring heightened security and prayer. He also warns of a vulnerability gap at airports and urges TSA employees to remain at work to prevent any incidents.

PROTECTION OF POLITICAL FIGURES AND FUTURE ELECTIONS: Brandon emphasizes the need for protective prayer over Donald Trump and his assets, including Trump Tower, Mar-a-Lago, and his golf courses. He specifically calls for a hedge of protection around Trump's family members, including Don Jr., Eric, Ivanka, Tiffany, Melania, and Barron, explicitly praying to break a "Kennedy curse" targeting Barron. Brandon details a vision of a formal black-tie event with golden goblets and ball gowns, warning of potential assassination attempts via poisoned food or drinks. Looking toward the future, Brandon warns of plans by foreign leaders, including Xi Jinping, to derail the 2028 election with another virus. He sees a severe storm and shaking hitting the church between 2027 and 2028, leading up to the year 2032. During this period, he also visualizes the late Kim Clement playing the piano and prophesying from the cloud of witnesses, as well as a demonic atmosphere surrounding a performance by Billie Eilish at a massive open-dome football stadium. Brandon describes Trump paddling a canoe to prevent America from falling into a Great Depression.

SPIRITUAL EXHORTATIONS AND PHYSICAL HEALING: Brandon delivers a message instructing believers to remain spiritually full of the Holy Spirit and the Word of God, warning that operating while spiritually empty or partially full will be ineffective in the coming days. He shares insights from Kathryn Kuhlman about the necessity of remaining quiet and still during prayer to properly listen to God. Additionally, Brandon provides a specific health directive for a listener suffering from severe constipation, bloating, and hemorrhoids. He states that these painful issues are simply the result of extreme dehydration and the overconsumption of carbonated drinks. He advises the individual to drink large quantities of bottled water to resolve the physical ailments, reinforcing that the solution is a basic dietary adjustment rather than a severe medical condition.
rawData: [November 06, 2025]-[You'll get what you asked for but it's not what you've thought]-[https://youtu.be/UfXV5KCRNn0]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. I want to go over what the Lord showed me real fast yesterday about the towers. There was a lot the Lord showed us yesterday, son. I want to show you this article real quick from Russia and what they said they want to do. It’s interesting. I told you Venezuela and Russia will become friends in the days ahead. I've told you this over and over again. I said Venezuela will be handed a lifeline from Russia to join the BRICS—to join the superpowers of the world because of oil and Venezuela and the visions in the past. I said they will back Russia's oil reserves and the things going on with Russia for their economy, and this would be an extension to them. So we see Russia saying today that they're open to sending hypersonic missiles to Venezuela. I wonder why? Well, because I told you in the visions yesterday that I saw that the Venezuelan prime minister will end up being a Saddam Hussein, and it will be like it was in Iraq; it would be its type and shadow. I thought that was kind of interesting. So now we also see that election anxiety triggers a $100 million wave of NYC buyers heading south. People want to head south. People are wanting to leave New York. And I told you what I saw. It wouldn't just be New York. In the days ahead, I saw Pennsylvania, I saw a lot of upper East states—far Northeast states—would start to migrate. The Christian families in those states, and non-Christians, trying to leave those areas saying, 'We want to relocate. We're done.' And so I saw a lot of that happening over the next year or two, people trying to really flee those areas because of riots there and because of all the things that the Lord has showed me. You know, I know we can stop a lot of this through prayer. We're going to pray, but I know that a lot of people are wanting to seek a better opportunity for their families, especially in school districts and liberals. And especially, isn't it interesting how that man came out so strong about who he really is? And that's the reason for the title of the video today: 'You'll get what you asked for, but it's not what you thought.' And that's to the people of New York. You'll get it. I saw him winning and I even saw him standing in New York Times Square as I saw the flash of light with the two men standing there from CNN, and that man was standing on stage at the New Year's Eve thing. I thought that was interesting because I knew he'd win. I told Braden, 'You know, even in the prophetic words, I told you all I was saying that basically New York's in trouble.' And I saw what David Wilkerson had prophesied was going to start to come to pass. The things that we have seen will start to pan out over the city of New York. A lot of people, it's going to be a ground of great testing and shaking. So, like I said, I don't come on here trying to bring fear, but I try to tell you what's coming and what the Lord has showed us. I'm going to go over the building that I saw, and it wasn't the Hudson. In my mind, I only see the Hudson River because I thought that was the only river, out of ignorance of what flows through New York. But it's the East River. So in the vision last night, I saw the East River, which my son said, 'The Hudson's over here, Daddy. The East River is right here.' So in the vision, I'm seeing the East River, and I called out the Hudson. So that's my mistake. I'm going to tell you that immediately. The East River is right here. I see Central Park up here. I see the East River and I see the building that's all glass. That was a strategic location for this attack that I saw. In between the East River and the garden is one of Trump's towers. And when I was looking at the building on fire, it was on the northeastern side. The fire and the explosion exploded all the way around and it caught the whole thing. It looked like 9/11 with the plane, but I don't know what caused the fire. I still don't, as I'm praying into this, but this is something that I want you to pray with me because I believe what the Lord showed me: I saw people on barges shooting some kind of rocket launcher or some kind of man-made device at this building. Well, this building is close enough to that river; it's right there. And as I was looking at everything on fire up top, if you go back to the prophetic word, the word of the Lord said, 'This is a distraction. This is not the main event; this is a distraction from what they're really going to try to do.' And as I was praying into this last night, the Lord showed me—because I was asking him, 'Lord, show us the date'—and he said, 'You ask a lot.' He doesn't want me to share that kind of stuff on YouTube. So he took me because he knows I love George Washington Carver and the book 'The Man Who Talks to the Flowers.' It's one of my favorite books. George Washington Carver asked, 'Show me what's about the peanut.' He goes, 'Go back and ask smaller, simpler questions. You're asking too much of a complex question.' He was saying, 'You need to think different. Go at this a different way.' It was the way he talked to George Washington Carver because I said, 'Lord, I want a deeper relationship with you. I want to hear you more intimately. I want to have more fellowship.' So here we are. We're going to pray tonight. I pray about the buildings. I pray about what I saw about Japan and South Korea and the Sooners. I went over that and I tried to tell you all about the Sooners and about the groundbreaking for Japan to have a crypto-backed currency that was backed by a certain cryptocurrency that would be part of their portfolio. It was the same thing with South Korea. In the days ahead, you would see Japan and South Korea become more crypto-friendly. Then the Lord had us praying over Iraq and he showed me the three men again. I saw the hydrocarbon law, the HCL, and Article 140. Praying over Article 140 for the distribution of wealth to the people of Iraq so that these three men that are hoarding the money from Iraq would reinstate their currency and bring it back to the way it should be for the Iraqi people. There are many avenues, in my opinion, that God wants to use to establish wealth for His people. There are many avenues. Now, I know there are many scams and things the enemy has tried to use to snare people, but I believe legitimately that God will reveal secret things, hidden things, and treasures of the deep to establish wealth for His people so that we don't lack any good thing. Do I believe that could be the Iraqi dinar? I have prayed over it for a long time. That is not investment advice; I'm not telling you to buy it. I'm just telling you I have prayed over the Iraqi dinar a lot, and the Lord has me interceding for that because there's great corruption in the country. It's not always about the people becoming filthy rich; it's about establishing a better tomorrow for the people of Iraq, too. They live in poverty and destitute situations. These people need some relief. They can't even have electricity on all the time because of how bad it is over there. Our troops are still over there, and we pray for them. There are a lot of things involving our bases, but there are just a lot of things the Lord has me praying over. One of the things I was interceding for last night was Rockefeller Center this month. In the next couple of weeks, for the lighting of the tree when everybody gets together at Rockefeller Center, usually right after Thanksgiving. We pray over that, New Year's Eve, and for the parade. There are a lot of major events taking place in the next four or five weeks. The building I believe the Lord showed me last night was Trump Tower. That's just the way it looked to me. Now, it could have been Central Park Tower or something like that, but there was another tower that looked very similar. It's all right next to that big river and Central Park. All I know is the enemy has a plan, but God has a greater plan. We are able to see Central Park Tower; it's a beautiful building. I'll tell you this: it was the 40th floor. I probably said too much, but that's the number that came up in my spirit when I was praying. Why the 40th floor? If Homeland Security ever sees this, I know I have people watching me all the time now. It was the 40th and 41st floors. That's what the Lord said to me; I heard that very loud. I thought that was interesting. Hopefully, that will help somebody praying over our TSA. We need the people who check the bags at the airports to get back to work before the Thanksgiving break. We need them working; we need our government back open. I saw that because people weren't working and there was a gap, they would try to pull something off in this timeframe. South Korea—the Lord showed that South Korea would be a place where you can touch down and then distribute the gospel throughout all of Asia. The enemy would try to come in and cause havoc in South Korea with communism and try to disrupt the flow of the gospel. It is about to take place that it would be an end-time hub, along with Taiwan. That's why they're being picked on so much, because they're more free. The Lord showed me we must pray for Taiwan and South Korea to remain strong and be pillars in this end-time army spreading the gospel into North Korea, China, and Vietnam. It's a great place because, with Dr. Cho and other churches there, it's a hub to bring forth the gospel throughout Asia. The Lord showed me that the enemy was trying to get a stronghold in their government to transform it into communism, like North Korea and China. That was interesting. Two weeks ago in Europe, 40,000 SIM cards were found. I knew they were establishing something in Europe. I don't know if this is part of a terrorist organization, but it's interesting that Homeland Security is busting these people with 40,000 cards. They're ransacking their stuff. It's a network of communication. Do you understand this is encrypted? This is well-thought-out, but there are four other places in America just like the New York and New Jersey area where they found over 100,000. The Lord said there are four other areas in America—cities like Seattle—that have a network of this. I thought it was interesting as we prayed that there were more SIM cards, similar to what happened in New York back in September. When they raided before the UN meetings, there were 100,000 SIM cards. The Lord said there are more SIM cards in other apartment buildings across the United States for an underground communication system. I'm praying our people will find these buildings or apartment complexes and bring these people to justice. It's well-funded, obviously. So let's pray tonight. I won't keep you long. I tried to keep it shorter so you could pray longer with me. Father, we thank You for the body. We thank You for all You've done and continue to do to uncover the darkness in the United States and around the world. I thank You for the glorious light, for the light has come and the glory of the Lord has risen upon us. I thank You for Your mercy and how good You've been to us. Thank You for the Holy Spirit and fire in our lives, that You stir us up from the top of our heads to the soles of our feet, and out of our bellies will flow rivers of living water. I thank You for the anointing of the Holy Ghost that flows inside us and reaches the lost. I thank You that we are the light right now and that when people see us, they are attracted. They say, "What's different about them?" We're not just normal; we're church unusual. We're unusual, but we stay full. That was the main thing the Lord said today: "Tell my people to stay full in these end times." They must remain full of the word of God and my presence. They cannot afford in the natural to let their cup not run over. They must have a conscience like a drive. How bad do you want this? How hungry and desperate are you to remain full in these last days? It's not just going to happen; you're going to have to put some effort into it. The Lord said people must remain full. So, Father, I thank you that we are a people remaining full—not just full of what, but filled with and controlled by the Holy Spirit and the word of God, so that we have an overflow and when people see us, they see Jesus in us. I thank you, Lord, for the Holy Ghost and fire. Father, you are causing us to go up higher with the fire and the glory of the Lord. We take the body, Father, and lift it up before you. We thank you, Lord, that by your stripes we are healed, whole, and well in the name of Jesus. We apply the blood over our households, our children, my wife, my children, our finances, our home, our car, and whatever we may have. I plead the blood even over the dogs. I thank you, Lord, that whatever we put our hands to will prosper. Father, if there's government employees watching this tonight, I thank you that you're their great supply. If they've been laid off right now and they don't have jobs because of the government shutdown in America, I thank you, Father, that you will supply for them. They'll lack no good thing. I thank you, Lord, for your supernatural hand on this house, your goodness, and your mercy. We plead the blood over their homes and they will fear not, for you are with them. We take this body right now in Jesus' name. Go tell your mama to come here. Thank you, son. Father, we thank you for the blood. What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. We thank you for the blood; we make much of the blood. I want you to pray with me. Help bring some push. I thank you for the blood. I hear you. Come over here and sit by me. "Baby, I don't have makeup on right now." It does not matter; you're beautiful no matter what. We take the blood and apply it, and the blood makes much of us. Go around the other side. Okay. We take the blood right now in Jesus' name. Your holy blood, Father. We thank you for the blood right now. Amen and amen. You take the blood. There you go, sit right there by me. She said, "I don't have any makeup on; I don't want to do this." I said, "Well, no, I didn't say I didn't want to do this, silly." She looks beautiful regardless. I told her, "Come over here with or without makeup, I don't care. It's fine." "You want a drink?" "No, I'm good." Is she in the shot? Come on over. I'll just stay over here. Oh, Father, we just thank you for the blood. I depend on her a lot. She helps me push. I feel her when she's here and when she's not. I'm struggling tonight a little, and I told her I need my friend. "I'll help you." Yes. Well, we've got work to do. There are a lot of times when you're pushing like this in the spirit realm—like yesterday, that was a lot of heavy lifting—and I got to get more full. That's why he said in the car, when I was in there, "Tell my people to remain full." I was out there vacuuming out Megan's stuff for food, and he said, "They're not remaining full enough." So I took that; he was talking to me, too. He said, "Tell my people to remain more full. Get more full in the word. Get more full of my presence. You cannot operate halfway full, empty, or even a quarter full from the top. You must always remain full for what's coming. You cannot be effective in this spirit realm by being just a little bit full, where you might be a quarter of the way to the top." The Lord said, "You must remain full." That's what he was saying. I thought that was interesting as we came home from church tonight and I was praying over everything. Even what Pastor Chip was talking about... I don't want to misquote him because he'll say I didn't pay attention, but I did pay attention. He was talking about when he went to Missouri and got a new revelation of the word. Now my mind went blank about what he said, and that's embarrassing as all get-out. So if you're watching, Pastor Chip, I was listening and now I'm going to get scolded for not paying attention in class. Help me, Holy Spirit; I'm just tired. Father, I just thank you. He talked about Mark Hankins and everything else tonight. I remember hearing everything he was saying, and then he called on me—probably because I put my head on your shoulder and he thought I was trying to go to sleep—and he said, "Brandon, do you remember this?" I said, "Yes, sir, I remember it." He goes, "How many times does the Lord talk to you in a week?" I said, "Well, he talks to me almost every day." You see, Brandon gets to talk to the Lord every day. I was putting my head on Diana's shoulder like that, and he probably thought I was falling asleep in church. But I wasn't; I was listening. I was just loving my wife. I love the Lord and I love having fun. If you can't have fun in church, then why go? You got to have fun and enjoy life. Life is too short not to laugh a little. I told D, "We need to laugh more." You find something fun and enjoy watching something together and just laughing. Life is so serious and sober, the grind of life, trying to make money to pay bills and raising kids. You just want to have fun. Just laugh a little bit. Have an ice cream. Is my shirt see-through? No, because the green's green and I'm wearing green. Are you in the forest? I didn't know if I was a floating head because I have this green on today and there's a green screen. Diana has a green screen shirt on. I just wondered if I was a floating head. Good to know. Well, if she can wear that, I'll wear one of my green shirts. It depends on how dark it is. If it's bright, then I put the blue on because I was wearing green. I love green, but I don't wear it anymore because I wear a green screen and I'll be a part of the forest. All right. We've got to be serious here. Father, I thank you for the blood. We just worship you, Father. And we thank you, Father, that we remain full. Thank you for our pastors. Thank you, Father, for people who feed us spiritually. Thank you, God, for all the people that you've put in leadership and positions of authority over the body of Christ. Father, we raise up and we become bolder about who we are and what we're called to do. Thank you, Father, for this position of leading people in prayer. I can't do it without you, Father; I can't do any of this without you. You know, I say it all the time: without the Holy Spirit spark, we can't do anything without Jesus. We need him, that Holy Ghost fire. It's okay, son. That's too much noise. Father, I thank you for the Holy Ghost and fire, for the glory of the Lord rising up on us. Father, I thank you, Lord, for every person represented here tonight, for that fire and that Holy Ghost spark inside of them. Father, when they go into their jobs or whatever they're called to do—they could be a security guard, they could be a nurse, or a doctor—I thank you, Father, that they're the best at what they do. Father, I thank you, Lord, for that anointing that is to get the job done. Father, you teach us all things. That's what he was talking about tonight: that, Father, he teaches us in all things. He will teach us and we will be the best. But it's not just about the word; we would be educated about all things. The Holy Spirit will teach us all things, all truth, all blessing, all of it, so that we don't lack any good thing. And I thank you, Father, that that's the kind of God we serve. They may be a tractor mechanic and they'll be the greatest tractor mechanic that's ever been. I don't know why I said that, but I believe I saw a tractor mechanic when I was praying right there in the vision: somebody working on a John Deere tractor. I saw the John Deere tractor and they were working on the engine. Isn't that interesting? And I'm not thinking about it because of green shirts, but it really was: I saw a green John Deere tractor and they were working on it. To be the best mechanic there is or the best aircraft mechanic, why not be the best at anything? All that you do, in word and in deed, we are to give all to the glory of God. All that we do, we do unto him. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that that's the kind of people we are in these last days. We don't just sit back and go, 'Well, you know what?' I told her we had one person who emailed and they had 666 in their email address. And I thought they're bold about being a devil worshiper. They're trying to tell us they're devil worshipers. I get that. But we're bold about being with Jesus. And we have maybe 777 in ours. I don't know. I guess that's God's number if they want to say 666 is theirs. But people are—you know what? You stand by what you believe. I guess if that's what you want to believe, you're believing the wrong thing. You're going to hell. But I want to tell you, I'm bold about Jesus just as much as you try to be bold about the devil. Or the people that try to come on here and tell everybody that they're giving five dollars because they're Muslim. We thank you for your five dollars, but you're still going to hell. I mean, I'm just saying if you don't know Jesus Christ, the only way you're ever going to get to heaven is through the Lord Jesus Christ. No Muhammad, not Buddha, not any other kind of false god. The only way to heaven is through the Lord Jesus Christ. Unless a man is born again, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God. Jesus is the only way. I don't care how much you come on and say, 'Hey, let me give you five dollars.' Put your name up and say, 'Allah is getting you to heaven.' Allah isn't getting you into heaven. I'm sorry, but it is not going to get you to heaven. To the man in New York saying he's going to put Islam in every household in America: good luck because you aren't doing it to mine. As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord. You aren't putting your garbage down my throat, telling me I've got to have Sharia law. We aren't having Sharia law up in here, Oklahoma or Texas. Your nonsense is nonsense. And the people will catch on to your lies, sir. And eventually they'll oust you just like they do everybody else. This is nonsense. 'Well, we'll have Sharia law.' You aren't going to have any Sharia law up in here. We're a Christian nation. We're not Muslim. We've got to have a million christians. He called it Islamophobic. I said, 'We're not Muslim. We're not afraid of you. We don't have Islamophobia. We just know you. We know your stuff is trash and what you say is a lie. And who you're serving is a false god who's dead. We serve a risen savior and his name is Jesus Christ and he's seated at the right hand of the Father making intercession for me right now. Yours is not. He's in hell burning forever. That's where your god is. He's in hell. He's false. Our God is the only God and he reigns supreme over all of them. They're all false and it's all demonic spirits. And we have the risen savior, Jesus Christ, who died for you and he rose again for you. And he doesn't want you to go to hell. He wants you to get born again and get saved. But it's time people get bold. If they want to be bold about what they believe in their Sharia law, we have to become even bolder and have our cup overflowing with the word of God in these last days. If you don't stand for something, you're going to lose it all. You must stand as a believing believer in these last days or you're going to have that kind of trash being forced down your throat and your kids in school telling them this is the way to go. I beg to differ with you. I'm telling you folks, we're in a time like we've never seen before that the church has got to become more radical for Jesus and stand for something. The political correctness has got to end where, 'Well, we don't want to offend people because it's not politically correct to become bold.' Well, they're praying so loud on their loudspeaker and going in the background and the church gets in trouble if we turn up our stuff too. Well, we don't want to say it on social media because now you offend them and you're going to go to jail in Europe. A little bit more compromise because the church becomes a little bit more quiet, a little bit more passive, a little bit more weak. But I guarantee you that George Washington, if he were back right now and he saw where some things are, he would roll over in his grave. He'd go, 'Oh no.' Seriously, our founding fathers would literally have a fit and flip out for some of the stuff that's going on right now and say, 'What are you all doing?' and slap every single one of them. But yet the church goes, 'It's okay.' No, no, we've got to accept everybody. I'm not saying we don't pray for them and we love on them, but we don't accept the sin. What is it about acceptance? No, sin leads you to hell. People need to wake up. Sin leads you to hell. Period. People don't want to hear that. But I'm telling you now, I'm surprised I have 5,500 people on here right now. People get mad, want to leave. 'Hey, I'm out of here because you tell me sin takes me to hell.' It's the truth. And it's my job to tell somebody what the word says and you don't want to hear it. That's fine. But at least I told you. Your blood's not on my hands. But it made me so upset when I heard his closing speech last night of what he said over the New York people and where he's at. And I thought, that's America. That's us. That's not too far from here. That's only a couple thousand miles away, but yet... Well, we don't want to speak out too much. And I thought, as he said, it sounds like a supervillain off a Batman movie. It did. It sounds like somebody in a Superman movie. You know, like whenever you hear the villain up there talking and he's telling all the people with his grandeur and he has the evil plan. Like Spider-Man, he has it behind him and he's the guy in the back planning some kind of mass evil plan to hurt everybody and he's talking about the City of Gotham and you're going, 'We've got a modern-day supervillain up there.' But this is not a movie. This is America. This is the land I love. This is the place I pray for every day of my life. And I thought, what are y'all thinking? They're not. They have a reprobate mind full of the devil. Why? Because the church isn't radical enough. They got scared and they shrunk back. And well, you know, it's not politically correct to always do that. And I'm just saying, well, a little leaven ruins the whole lump. A little leaven, just a little bit, and after a while, we see what happens up north. And I pray—that's why the Lord said to me, 'Brandon, it's trying to come down on Oklahoma. Remember my word that the Lord gave y'all through me.' He said it will have a dividing line from Altus, Oklahoma to Miami, and it will be divided with the next governor's race. It will be blue and red. It will be a fight to stay red. You must pray for Oklahoma. That's what he said. For a state that's predominantly red and has very moral values, all this will try to go blue in the next race. And I went, 'Very conservative.' And I thought, 'No way. We'll never see that. No way.' And the Lord's warning about it. He said, 'Pray. Pray over Arkansas. Pray over Louisiana. Pray over Texas. Pray over these states. Pray over this state that we remain the heartland of America, of the Bible Belt. And we stand for it. And we're radically born again in this area. And this is a place of refuge for the end times.' I'm telling you, I've seen the people by the millions here coming for the revivals. Stand for Jesus. We must stand for Jesus. As bold as they are for Muhammad, we must stand for Jesus. They're radical about their prayer. They're radical about what they believe. They treat their women, put them in head coverings, and they do all things. They're radical about what they believe. But we must become radical about Jesus. I'm not talking about being violent like they would be. I'm saying you must become radical about your belief and stand for what you believe. Jesus is Lord. Jesus is Lord over America. Jesus is Lord over Oklahoma. Jesus is Lord over Tulsa and Oklahoma City and Edmond. Jesus is Lord over Texas and Fort Worth and Dallas and wherever you are. Jesus is Lord. I proclaim it and I'm bold about it. Colorado Springs, Colorado. Jesus is Lord over Queensland, Australia. Jesus is Lord. Thank you, Father. Lord, we just thank you that you're Lord. And I thank you for that fire. I was seeing a man as I was driving by today and he was demon-possessed and he was off his rocker. I said, 'Father, I thank you for greater fire.
